modules.title: Order-to-Cash (Sales & Distribution)
learning_objectives: Create, change, and display a sales order (VA01/VA02/VA03)
Understand delivery, picking and goods issue (VL01N, movement 601)
Explain how billing (VF01) hands revenue to Financial Accounting

modules.title: Procure-to-Pay (Materials Management)
learning_objectives: Post a goods receipt (MIGO, movement 101, MSEG)

modules.title: Financial Accounting & Integration
learning_objectives: Understand the FI document structure (BKPF header / BSEG items)
Trace how SD billing and MM invoice verification post to FI via account determination

capstone: Trace a single business transaction end-to-end: sales order (VA01) → delivery (VL01N) → billing (VF01) → FI document (BKPF/BSEG), and the parallel procurement flow ME21N → MIGO → MIRO → FI.
